migration.restore.title: Restore from a migration package
migration.restore.subtitle: Choose a package from the old PC, preview the exact writes, approve the hash, then restore.
migration.restore.packageHint: The folder must contain migration-manifest.json from the capture package.
migration.restore.invalidPackageWarning: Choose valid package and checkpoint folders.
migration.restore.noManifestWarning: No migration manifest could be loaded
migration.restore.note.title: What restore can and cannot do
migration.restore.note.body: Profile-relative config files enter the write plan. Machine-locked, partial, missing, or blocked items stay in Manual for reinstall, sign-in, or hand merge.
migration.restore.planHint: The rows below are the plan tied to the hash you approve.
migration.restore.approve: I reviewed this restore plan - approve
migration.restore.skipped: Not added to the write plan
migration.restore.undo.title: .bak undo for overwritten files
migration.restore.undo.body: Undo restores overwritten files from journaled .bak files through the same gated restore path. Files created by restore are shown as cannot-undo rows and will remain.
migration.restore.undo.approve: I reviewed this undo plan - approve
migration.restore.previewSummary: {0} writes planned · {1} skipped · {2} restored · {3} reinstall · {4} manual
migration.restore.resultSummary: {0} done · {1} failed or blocked · {2} not run · {3} restored · {4} reinstall · {5} manual
migration.restore.undoSummary: {0} overwritten files reverted · {1} failed or rejected
migration.restore.rail.title: Restore summary
